title: Weekly Sync - July 27 2026
body: Attendees: Alice Chen and Bob Patel. We reviewed progress against the Q3 roadmap. Key decision: the team will launch the beta on Aug 15. Bob to prepare the marketing campaign for the launch, aligning with the design team on campaign assets. Action items: Alice drafts the release plan, which should include milestones, roll-back criteria, and a communications timeline. Also need to finalize the user testing schedule before Aug 1. Bob will follow up on beta invite list. Alice reminded everyone that the raw notes from this sync must not be shared externally. Next sync: Aug 3.
